title: Word Counter & Character Counter
description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs and estimate reading time instantly.

inputs.label: Enter or paste your text
inputs.placeholder: Type or paste your text here...

seo.title: Word Counter & Character Counter - Free Online Tool | ToolVerse
seo.description: Count words, characters, sentences and paragraphs instantly. Free online word counter with reading time estimation.

faq.question: How does the word counter work?
faq.answer: The word counter splits your text by whitespace and counts the resulting segments. It also counts characters, sentences (split by punctuation), and paragraphs (split by blank lines).

faq.question: What is reading time based on?
faq.answer: Reading time is estimated at 200 words per minute, which is the average adult reading speed.

faq.question: Does it count special characters?
faq.answer: Yes, the character counter includes all characters — letters, numbers, symbols, and spaces. The 'Characters (no spaces)' output excludes whitespace.

howToUse: Paste or type your text in the input area. Word count, character count, sentence count, paragraph count and estimated reading time update in real-time as you type.

title: JSON Formatter & Validator
description: Format, beautify and validate JSON data with syntax highlighting. Detect errors instantly.

seo.title: JSON Formatter & Validator - Free Online Tool | ToolVerse
seo.description: Format, beautify and validate JSON data online. Free JSON formatter with syntax highlighting, error detection and indentation options.

faq.question: What does the JSON formatter do?
faq.answer: It takes raw or minified JSON text, parses it, and outputs it in a human-readable, properly indented format. It also validates that the JSON is syntactically correct.

faq.question: What happens if my JSON is invalid?
faq.answer: The tool will display an error message indicating what went wrong and approximately where the error is located in your JSON string.

faq.question: Can I choose the indentation level?
faq.answer: Yes, you can choose between 2 spaces, 4 spaces, or tab indentation using the dropdown menu.

howToUse: Paste your JSON data into the input area, select your preferred indentation, and click 'Run Tool'. The formatted output will appear below with syntax validation status.

title: Base64 Encode & Decode
description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings back to plain text instantly.

inputs.label: Enter text or Base64 string
inputs.placeholder: Enter text to encode or Base64 to decode...

seo.title: Base64 Encode & Decode - Free Online Tool | ToolVerse
seo.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings online. Free, instant Base64 encoder and decoder tool.

faq.question: What is Base64 encoding?
faq.answer: Base64 is a binary-to-text encoding scheme that represents binary data using 64 ASCII characters. It's commonly used to embed data in URLs, emails, and HTML.

faq.question: Is Base64 encryption?
faq.answer: No. Base64 is an encoding, not encryption. It does not provide any security — anyone can decode a Base64 string. Use it for data transport, not for hiding sensitive information.

faq.question: What characters does Base64 use?
faq.answer: Base64 uses A-Z, a-z, 0-9, + and / (64 characters total), with = used for padding. URL-safe Base64 replaces + with - and / with _.

howToUse: Enter your text in the input area and select 'Encode' or 'Decode' mode. The result updates in real-time as you type.

title: UUID / GUID Generator
description: Generate random UUID v4 identifiers. Bulk generate multiple UUIDs at once.

seo.title: UUID Generator - Generate Random UUID/GUID Online | ToolVerse
seo.description: Generate random UUID v4 identifiers online. Bulk generate multiple UUIDs with options for uppercase and hyphen formatting.

faq.question: What is a UUID?
faq.answer: A UUID (Universally Unique Identifier) is a 128-bit identifier that is practically unique across all systems. Version 4 UUIDs are randomly generated and have the format xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx.

faq.question: Are generated UUIDs truly unique?
faq.answer: UUID v4 uses random numbers, making collisions astronomically unlikely. The probability of generating a duplicate is about 1 in 2^122 (5.3 x 10^36).

faq.question: What is the difference between UUID and GUID?
faq.answer: UUID and GUID are essentially the same thing. GUID (Globally Unique Identifier) is Microsoft's term for UUID. They follow the same specification and format.

howToUse: Set the number of UUIDs you want to generate, choose formatting options (uppercase, hyphens), and click 'Run Tool'. Click the copy button to copy all generated UUIDs.

title: Case Converter
description: Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case and PascalCase.

inputs.label: Enter your text
inputs.placeholder: Type or paste text to convert...

seo.title: Case Converter - Transform Text Case Online | ToolVerse
seo.description: Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case and more. Free online case converter tool.

faq.question: What case formats are supported?
faq.answer: The tool supports: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and CONSTANT_CASE.

faq.question: What is camelCase?
faq.answer: camelCase joins words together with no separator, capitalizing the first letter of each word except the first. Example: 'hello world' becomes 'helloWorld'. It's commonly used for variable names in JavaScript.

faq.question: What is the difference between snake_case and kebab-case?
faq.answer: snake_case uses underscores between words (common in Python and databases), while kebab-case uses hyphens (common in URLs and CSS class names). Both use lowercase letters.

howToUse: Enter your text in the input area, select the target case format from the dropdown, and the converted text will appear in real-time.
